name: KTL Global Limited
summary: KTL Global Limited, together with its subsidiaries, operates in the branding, operation, and procurement (BOP) service industry. The company provides branding management, operational support, and central procurement services, as well as human resource recruitment, customized training, and development services to the downstream operators that supply to hospitals, clinics, and pharmacies in various provinces of the People's Republic of China with automatic vending kiosks (AVK) dispensing medical consumables and supplements. It is also involved in the inspection and certification of lifting equipment and certification of wire ropes; developing and advancing the technology of synthetics material for use in the manufacture of heavy lift synthetics sling; and the property investment ctivites. The company was incorporated in 2007 and is based in Singapore.
